/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=12.0 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/xcm_sdl_preview.dir/src/html_tokenizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcm_sdl_preview.dir/src/css_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcm_sdl_preview.dir/src/style_resolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcm_sdl_preview.dir/src/layout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcm_sdl_preview.dir/src/paint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xcm_sdl_preview.dir/src/xcm_sdl_preview.cpp.o -o xcm_sdl_preview   -L/usr/local/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.8/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.8/lib /usr/local/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.8/lib/libSDL2.dylib /usr/local/Cellar/sdl2_ttf/2.24.0/lib/libSDL2_ttf.dylib
